metadata.title: Premium Sea Urchin & Salmon | Hong Kong & Macau
metadata.description: Hong Kong and Macau's leading supplier of premium sea urchin (uni) and salmon. Fresh from Japan, Canada, and worldwide sources. Wholesale and retail.
metadata.keywords: sea urchin, uni, salmon, Hong Kong, Macau, seafood, Japanese uni, premium seafood, wholesale seafood, fresh salmon

hero.title: Premium Sea Urchin & Salmon
hero.subtitle: Hong Kong & Macau's Trusted Seafood Partner
hero.description: We source the finest sea urchin and salmon from Japan, Canada, and premium origins worldwide. Serving Hong Kong and Macau's top restaurants, hotels, and retailers.

features.qualityDesc: Hand-selected sea urchin and sashimi-grade salmon sourced from the world's best fisheries.
features.supplyDesc: Consistent year-round supply chain serving Hong Kong and Macau markets.
features.expertDesc: Deep knowledge of the sea urchin and salmon industry across grading, sourcing, and market trends.

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for premium sea urchin and salmon in Hong Kong & Macau.
